heroDescription: Explore how people connect. Load a Nostr ID, inspect its relationships, watch live zaps, open profiles, and understand the surrounding network.

preview.imageAlt: Preview of the Nostr identity explorer

today.title: A constellation of people
today.description: Load an npub, inspect its connections, and expand other profiles.

identity.title: identity
identity.detail: Paste an npub or nprofile to open the starting point.

map.title: live map
map.detail: Inspect connections and relays with high-level physics simulation.

signal.title: zaps
signal.detail: Read live zaps and profiles as clues to understand what is happening across the network.

kinds.title: Kinds used by the project today
kinds.description: These are the kinds the product currently queries or interprets. They come from the current Sigma code and connected identity surfaces.

metadata.name: Profile metadata
metadata.purpose: Hydrates name, bio, avatar, nip05, and the base data used by Sigma and the classic profile view.

notes.name: Public notes
notes.purpose: Builds the connected timeline and also feeds text extraction for keywords and social context.

contacts.name: Contact list
contacts.purpose: Resolves root follows, inbound followers, mutuals, node expansion, and structure panels.

relays.name: Relay list
relays.purpose: Reads preferred relays for relay-aware discovery, better coverage, and more faithful export.

zaps.name: Zap receipts
zaps.purpose: Listens to and parses zap receipts for the live layer and the economic context around visible nodes.

primal.name: Primal user info cache
primal.purpose: Reads media fallbacks and image variants from cache2.primal.net to improve profile photos.

demo.title: Start with Nostr Espacial.
demo.description: Jump straight into the map: inspect real relationships, read live zaps, and open profiles to understand how each network is shaped.

footer.description: Hackathon project for La Crypta IDENTITY Hackathon 2026 to explore Nostr relationships.

zap.title: Zap the developer
zap.description: Send sats to {address} to support development of the explorer.
zap.paid: Payment sent with WebLN. Thanks for supporting development.

errors.invalidLightningAddress: The Lightning Address must use the format user@domain.
errors.invalidLnurlResponse: The LNURL server did not return a valid response.
errors.missingLnurlFields: The Lightning Address does not expose a complete LNURL-pay endpoint.
errors.insecureCallback: For safety, the LNURL-pay callback must use HTTPS.
errors.invoiceCreationFailed: The Lightning invoice could not be created.
errors.missingInvoice: The LNURL server did not return a BOLT11 invoice.
errors.missingWebln: WebLN was not detected in this browser.
errors.prepareZap: The zap could not be prepared.
errors.copyInvoice: The invoice could not be copied from the browser.
